command.notes: Announce the beta sign-up window with a concrete actionable anchor: a date (Thursday) and a concrete CTA (the sign-up link goes in the brand's bio). No vague teasing.

exercises: structure: announcement carries a concrete anchor (date + CTA) — guards against FM.WEAK_HOOK
on-voice: matches the brand's plainspoken launch register
reviewer_note: A well-formed announcement: it names when and what to do. Contrast with cal-08, which deliberately omits the anchor.
